candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing/subtotal line, not preferred when a clean reported total exists.
Wrong section; non-current assets are not ACT.

candidates.row_label: Adjustments for losses (gains) on disposal of non-current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment, unrelated to current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Balance sheet cash-like line whose values exactly match cash and cash equivalents at end of period in the cash flow statement; best balance-sheet proxy for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Semantically exact cash balance, but target prefers balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance-sheet end-of-period cash amount.

candidates.row_label: Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents before effect of exchange rate changes
candidates.why: Change in cash, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX effect, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net Transfer of Cash from Acquisitions
candidates.why: Transaction item, not ending cash.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist because the target is a balance-sheet cash line and Bank deposit matches the cash-flow ending cash values exactly.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Current liabilities of long term debt
candidates.why: Only a component of current liabilities, more appropriate for STD.

candidates.row_label: Trade payables and other current liabilities
candidates.why: Cash flow movement line, not balance-sheet stock.
Balancing/component line, not the total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not preferred when a clean total exists.
Non-current liabilities, wrong target.
Non-current liabilities, wrong target.

candidates.row_label: Other Non-current Liabilities - Total - Remaining value
candidates.why: Non-current liabilities, wrong target.
Non-current and balancing line, wrong target.
Wrong section; non-current liabilities are not LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current liabilities of long term debt
candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet line for current debt/current maturities; excludes lease liabilities because leases are reported separately as Current lease liabilities.
Semantically relevant candidate, but no usable reported values shown and a cleaner current debt line exists.
Lease-related and should be excluded from STD under baseline rule.

final_choice.row_label: Current liabilities of long term debt

variables.notes: Used the clean current debt line and excluded Current lease liabilities per the lease-exclusion rule.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Potentially relevant but broader and less clean than Tax payable.
Deferred tax is non-current/timing-related, not current taxes payable.

variables.notes: Selected the clean current tax payable line.

candidates.why: Major PPE component and appears to be net carrying amount of core tangible fixed assets.
Additional PPE component covering other tangible assets.
Could include non-PPE items such as right-of-use assets and possibly intangibles/other fixed assets; less clean for PPE specifically.
Intangibles are not PPE.

variables.notes: No clean total PPE line is reported. Selected the tangible PPE components visible in the balance sheet and excluded Right-of-use assets. Manual review recommended because Total fixed assets may also be used as a broader proxy in some years.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activity
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.
Operating cash flow subtotal before interest/taxes and before the final net operating cash flow line; less preferred than the net line.
Placeholder/blank variant, not the populated reported line.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activity

variables.notes: Selected the explicit net cash flow from operating activities line.
